title: Remove FW: from forward email with Make Webhook
excerpt: Hello!  I am trying to create a webhook in Make (previously Integromat) to remove the FW: in the item name when you forward an email to the board.  I can’t figure out the replace string array and I am getting a runtime e…

posts.author: iwiretech (Brienne Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I am trying to create a webhook in Make (previously Integromat) to remove the FW: in the item name when you forward an email to the board. I can’t figure out the replace string array and I am getting a runtime error. Does anyone have a solution or can help me with the correct steps for the Make Scenario? @JCorrell – I know you showed an example on Integromat in a post in 2021 with copy but I couldn’t figure out how to edit that to make it work for my scenario

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@iwiretech

If you give me the details, I can help.

Generally, to just remove “FW:”, something like this will work: {{replace(4.name; "/FW:\s*(.*)/"; "$1")}}:

image913×961 45.4 KB

posts.author: iwiretech (Brienne Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
JCorrell:

{{replace(4.name; "/FW:\s*(.*)/"; "$1")}}:

Thanks for the quick response! Here are the two modules and how I have them set up. And I also included a picture of my error. Maybe I have chosen the incorrect modules?

image1008×433 58.9 KB

image559×800 37.8 KB

image1145×194 21.5 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@iwiretech

  1. The “:” at the end should be removed.
  2. The column ID does not need to me mapped. Should simply be “name”.
